title: TLH Advocates advises VoltSeal on pre-Series fundraise
description: Bijlibox India Private Limited, dba VoltSeal, has raised funds from a pre-seed fundraise led by Theia Ventures, with participation from Rainmatter by Zerodha, Momentum Capital, Social Alpha and a group of angel investors.TLH, Advocates & Solicitors advised VoltSeal on this fundraise. The Firm advised on the drafting, negotiation, and finalisation of the definitive transaction documentations.The transaction team consisted of Prateek Batra (Partner), Mayank Labh (Senior Associate), Vanshika Gu
